title: Healing Spell Commentary
tagline: Nearby NPCs react when the player casts healing magic.
description:
This plugin adds dynamic NPC reactions to healing spells cast by the player. When a healing spell is detected, nearby NPCs will comment on the magic based on their race and disposition.

Features:
- Race-specific reactions (Nords are suspicious, Bretons are appreciative)
- Context-aware commentary (combat vs peaceful healing)
- Compatible with all vanilla healing spells
author: ExampleUser
